signal.description: Exact hierarchical signal path to trace the active driver for

requested_time.description: Waveform time to query the active driver, e.g. '120ns'

include_control.description: Report control context (if/case) when no assignment confirmed (default true)

include_parity.description: Run parity check: compare active trace vs static driver candidates

include_trace.description: Return full data.trace with nodes, edges, selected_path (default false for compact)

include_alias_candidates.description: Include alias_candidates even when a unique alias was resolved

limits.description: Resource limits for the recursive active trace

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth through pass-through assignments and aliases (default 8)

max_nodes.description: Maximum number of trace nodes before truncation (default 50)

max_alias_candidates.description: Maximum number of alias candidates to explore (default 8)

max_trace_signals.description: Maximum signal count for value lookup (default 64)

output.description: Output format controls. verbosity=full|debug implies include_trace=true
